patch.value: GH-641: plan link promotion rejects registered implements relationship kind

Plan link promotion advertises an implements relationship but rejects that kind at runtime; align plan workflow validation with the canonical extensible relationship registry and preserve SDK/CLI contract parity.

value.author: codex-root-20260722
value.text: Duplicate check 2026-07-22: searched all statuses for GH-641, plan link promotion, advertised implements, relationship kind, and plan workflow validation. Existing closed pm-je50 owns the shipped Plan SDK primitives and open pm-ju83 owns the extensible relationship registry, but no item tracks this concrete regression; this issue is the canonical GH-641 lineage.

value.author: codex-root-20260722
value.text: GitHub provenance: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/641. Related closed Plan SDK lineage pm-je50, relationship-registry owner pm-ju83, and adjacent strict Plan metadata issue pm-qd3woa define the regression boundary.
